CE1.justification: Acted directly with no clarifying questions and no asks for the user to load anything.

CE2.justification: Single short sentence — 'Logged the contractor onboarding observation in observations.md.' — no preamble, no narration, no trailing summary.

CE3.justification: Names the destination file in-band but offers no why-clause for routing or framing choices.

CE4.justification: One clean append to observations.md; interruption would leave a coherent partial state.
